Sync the resolved catalog snapshot to Orun Cloud and advance the head.

Uploads the snapshot's object closure (only the blobs the server is missing) and
advances the catalog head to it, recording the source git commit. The org-global
catalog browser reflects the new snapshot within seconds.

Run `orun catalog refresh` first to (re)resolve the workspace; push
uploads whatever 'catalogs/current' points at. Use --environment to target a
named environment head instead of the project-wide head.

Usage:
  orun catalog push [flags]

Flags:
      --backend-url string   Backend URL (Orun Cloud or self-hosted)
      --environment string   Target a named environment head (default: the project-wide head)
      --org string           Alias of --workspace (legacy spelling)
      --project string       Project id/slug (overrides the cached link)
      --workspace string     Workspace slug/id (overrides the cached link)

Global Flags:
      --all                 Disable CWD-based component scoping; process all components
  -c, --config-dir string   Config directory for JobRegistry definitions (or set ORUN_CONFIG_DIR; use * or ** for recursive scanning)
  -i, --intent string       Intent file path (auto-discovered if not set) (default "intent.yaml")
